title: bombax oleagineum
intro: Bombax oleagineum, also known as the Crape Myrtle or Butea fruit, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Bombax oleagineum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including tea, powder, and oil, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
